title: Asuka and Shinjis kiss
wikitext:
[]: Asuka & Shinji's kiss             Quote Post by pHasE _4! » Tue Aug 16, 2005 5:58 am You guys know how it is said that Eva is based on Anno's prior 'ill mental state'. And that nearly all symbolism is of some sort symbolic of his past experiences. Now what i'm getting at is this. What does the 'awkward kiss' symbolise in his life. Does it mean that he had a really good oppurtunity to hit it off with a hot red-head and maybe blew it? Or is it just 'Fanservice'. I really would like to hear some opinions on what exactly was going through her mind when she forced him to lock-lips. I just can't seem to find a credible explanation. [/i]

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Aug 16, 2005 6:05 am I suggest you read Shin-seiki's theory here: The fabled Shinji and Asuka thread It may not have all the answers you are looking for, but it was a real eye-opener, at least for me.

[]: Re: Asuka & Shinji's kiss             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 16, 2005 6:44 am First off, you have to beware of the blandishments of the S/A shippers, such as Ryo :P pHasE _4! wrote: Does it mean that he had a really good oppurtunity to hit it off with a hot red-head and maybe blew it?

[]: Re: Asuka & Shinji's kiss             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Aug 16, 2005 1:32 pm Mr. Tines wrote: First off, you have to beware of the blandishments of the S/A shippers, such as Ryo :P

[]: Re: Asuka & Shinji's kiss             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 16, 2005 3:28 pm Ryo wrote: I think he was talking about Anno here, not Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 16, 2005 3:46 pm Disclaimer: I am an A/S Shipper, as Mr. Tines put and I see the scene as Asuka trying to...show affections for Shinji while not admitting anything..

[]: Re: Asuka & Shinji's kiss             Quote Post by chiefen » Wed Aug 17, 2005 1:37 am Mr. Tines wrote: Ryo wrote: I think he was talking about Anno here, not Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by pHasE _4! » Wed Aug 17, 2005 2:44 am Thanx for the Shinji and Asuka thread Ryo, it helped a lot. Its amazing how much 'extra' there is in virtually not much extra in the Director's Cuts. I'm yet to see it though but i heard that thers not too much added footage. But i guess its enough for clarity. To Chiefen: Did u ask if Asuka dated Shinji? Well that didn't happen at all. Unless i'm mistaken. That would need a whole series on its own. Their relationship is way complex. :?

[]: Re: Asuka & Shinji's kiss             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Aug 17, 2005 3:01 am chiefen wrote: Wasn't he dating her? Or am I completely wrong?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Aug 17, 2005 11:14 am there was also a rumor that he was shot down by another voice actress before eva, leading to his depression...right?

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Aug 17, 2005 11:58 am sadsadshinji wrote: there was also a rumor that he was shot down by another voice actress before eva, leading to his depression...right?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Aug 17, 2005 12:53 pm Realy this is the first i've heard of AOKI URU i'll need to look into what this show would have been.

[]:             Quote Post by pHasE _4! » Thu Aug 18, 2005 9:27 am Do u guys mind if i swing this a different direction a bit Don't know if anybody else noticed this in the series(u all probably did)...but there's two areas of which i know of where anno puts an emphasis on something simple. In ep.15(during cello part) & ep.18(when Asuka speaks to Hikari during sunset: within 10mins of ep), there's brief focus on Asuka's feet movement. During both these times, She is either speaking to Shinji or gets asked bout him. Naturally, insults come out of her mouth, but a sudden focus then goes to her feet. Her feet move quite happily when he's the subject of conversation. It just shows a paradox between what she says, and what she truly feels. Just something to think about.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Aug 18, 2005 9:36 am That is honity not somthing I've heard before, might check it out.

[]:             Quote Post by pHasE _4! » Thu Aug 18, 2005 9:40 am It isn't? Well good on me then.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Aug 18, 2005 11:53 am The scene with Asuka and Hikari in #18 seems to be an hommage to a scene in the shoujo anime series Oniisama E: http://animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=148316 There's a curious focus on the character's feet in both cases. Also, if you read that thread, you'll see why no one at AN misses RahOtaku...

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Aug 18, 2005 12:05 pm O man i tottally do not remember any of this stuff... i really gata get the last of the platinum disc and the dc.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Aug 18, 2005 5:17 pm Umm...how do feet move happily? I think the most revealing parts of Asuka's emotions are in the mind rape (Shinji is there...), and her actions (inviting him in a rather strange way)

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sat Aug 20, 2005 5:00 pm o god thats just fu*king creepy!

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Sat Aug 20, 2005 7:46 pm pHasE _4! wrote: To Chiefen: Did u ask if Asuka dated Shinji? Well that didn't happen at all. Unless i'm mistaken. That would need a whole series on its own. Their relationship is way complex. :?
